# Motion briefs — 27 animated scenes (~221s of built motion)
*Generated by prompt_builder.py from each scene's `animation_prompt` (motion intent) + `visual_facts` (hold-constraints). One brief = one buildable AE scene, on the ladder: camera move → parallax → element motion. See docs/after_effects_workflow.md; QC per visual-accuracy-gate Layer 3.*

### Scene 01 — 7s → `clips/scene_01_animated.mp4`
- **Base still:** `images/scene_01.png`
- **Brief:** very slow push-in toward the woman at the rim; soft dawn haze; faint parallax on the steps below. Duration 7s. Build over the validated 4K still images/scene_01.png — transforms only, never redraw the art; ease every keyframe pair (F9); max 1-2 moving elements; 0.5-1s hold at both ends; render 3840x2160 @ 30fps to clips/scene_01_animated.mp4. Must stay true to (may not move, deform, or be covered): Square plan (~35 m per side), an inverted pyramid OPEN to the sky: widest at the top rim, narrowing to a single small square water tank at the bottom. The center is EMPTY OPEN AIR (the void) — NO buildings, towers, rooms, temples or palace inside it, nothing but bare stepped walls around empty space.; Exactly three of the four sides are covered ENTIRELY in bare steps — plain stepped walls with NO buildings, rooms, towers, arches or structures on them. Only the fourth (north) side carries a single modest multi-storey pillared pavilion/gallery. Do NOT fill the well with a palace, fort or temple complex, and do NOT put buildings on more than one side.; About 3,500 steps and ~13 storeys / ~20 m deep — many stacked horizontal terrace landings (not the overstated 30 m / 100 ft).; No modern white pipe railings and no diagonal metal access stair (both are modern additions — omit in period scenes)..

### Scene 02 — 7s → `clips/scene_02_animated.mp4`
- **Base still:** `images/scene_02.png`
- **Brief:** slow downward drift following the descent; shadows shift gently. Duration 7s. Build over the validated 4K still images/scene_02.png — transforms only, never redraw the art; ease every keyframe pair (F9); max 1-2 moving elements; 0.5-1s hold at both ends; render 3840x2160 @ 30fps to clips/scene_02_animated.mp4. Must stay true to (may not move, deform, or be covered): Stepped sides are double flights of steps in a tessellated zig-zag diamond lattice — paired V-flights repeating across the terraces; ordered geometry, not random or a single straight staircase.; Dry-laid mortarless sandstone: rectangular coursed blocks with visible open joints, no mortar or cement..
